title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body: Banned: spam_wave_42 (phishing spam across 6 channels), toxic_runner (repeated targeted harassment of newcomers). Warned: new_member_17 (off-topic posting in #introductions), bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automated behavior in help channels). No action: trusted_helper (dispute, trusted member), core_maintainer (false positive from brigading). Queue cleared.
